summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a fall ’79 show featuring a monster St. of Circumstance, soaring Half‑Step Tower and Brent’s first Casey Jones.
review: The 142393_sbd_miller recording is praised as one of the best‑sounding tapes in the archive – crisp, clear and expertly patched. Musically the concert delivers a standout second set with Miracle → Bertha → Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance, a blistering 19‑minute St. of Circumstance, and Brent’s debut Casey Jones, while the first set builds from an average start to tight El Paso and a solid Half‑Step Tower. Overall fans consider this a must‑listen performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Multiple 5‑star reviews highlight superb audio quality and exceptional performances; only one mixed 3‑star review tempers the average, yielding a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear sound with excellent patches; described as the best audio in the archive and one of the most sonic recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set starts a bit slow but tightens with El Paso and Franklin’s Tower; second set is the highlight, delivering a seamless Miracle‑Bertha‑Lost Sailor‑Saint sequence, an epic St. of Circumstance, and a fiery closing jam.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for soaring half‑step Tower tone and playful lead work throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted for tightening the first set with a superb El Paso and delivering powerful jams in the second set.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s late‑70s prog keyboard sounds highlighted, especially on the Saint of Circumstance and Casey Jones.
band_member_comments.Drums: Classic Space segment and strong drum work noted; drummers stay out for an iconic Space jam.
